description: Vercel WAF rule template to bypass rate limiting for Google PageSpeed Insights
instructions: Replace <GOOGLE_IP_RANGES> with actual IP ranges from google-ips.json

waf_rule.name: Allow Google PageSpeed Insights
waf_rule.description: Bypass rate limiting for Lighthouse audits from Google PageSpeed API

notes: This rule should be ordered BEFORE any rate-limiting rules in the WAF
Update the IP ranges weekly using the update-google-ips.sh script
Monitor Vercel logs for 429 errors to ensure the rule is working
For Vercel Pro/Enterprise plans only - Trusted IPs feature required
